info.name: OFeed Server API Scenarios
info.description:
Scenario-driven REST API collection for the OFeed server.

Important notes:
- Configure a Postman environment before running the collection.
- XML and image file uploads use paths relative to apps/server/postman. For Newman use --working-dir apps/server/postman.
- validateXml defaults to false so local runs do not depend on fetching the external IOF XSD.
- Password reset confirm is optional and requires passwordResetToken plus runPasswordResetConfirm=true.
- Event image upload and public image fetch are optional and require runEventImageScenario=true plus working public storage configuration on the server.
- Admin scenarios are optional and require runAdminScenarios=true plus a valid adminBearerToken.
- External import defaults to ORIS because it runs without an Eventor API key. Switch provider/api key in the environment when needed.

item.description: Initialize runtime variables and confirm the local server, platform endpoints, docs, GraphQL, and map smoke routes are reachable.

pm.test('Health payload has checks array', function () { pm.expect(body.checks).to.be.an('array'); });

pm.test('Reference body looks like HTML', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text().toLowerCase()).to.include('<html'); });

item.name: [POST] /graphql - Create competitor via GraphQL with all parameters

body.raw:
{
  "operationName": "GraphqlCompetitorCreate",
  "query": "mutation GraphqlCompetitorCreate($input: StoreCompetitorInput!) { competitorCreate(input: $input) { message competitor { id classId teamId leg firstname lastname bibNumber nationality registration license rankingPoints rankingReferenceValue organisation shortName card startTime finishTime time status lateStart note externalId splits { controlCode time } } } }",
  "variables": {
    "input": {
      "eventId": "{{eventId}}",
      "classId": {{classId}},
      "origin": "START",
      "firstname": "GraphQL",
      "lastname": "Competitor",
      "bibNumber": 811,
      "nationality": "CZE",
      "registration": "{{graphqlCompetitorRegistration}}",
      "license": "C",
      "rankingPoints": 4333,
      "rankingReferenceValue": 4700,
      "organisation": "{{graphqlOrganisation}}",
      "shortName": "GQL",
      "card": {{graphqlCompetitorCard}},
      "startTime": "{{graphqlCompetitorStartTime}}",
      "finishTime": "{{graphqlCompetitorFinishTime}}",
      "time": {{graphqlCompetitorTime}},
      "teamId": null,
      "leg": 3,
      "status": "Active",
      "lateStart": false,
      "note": "Created via GraphQL",
      "externalId": "{{graphqlCompetitorExternalId}}"
    }
  }
}

item.name: [POST] /graphql - Update GraphQL-created competitor with all parameters

body.raw:
{
  "operationName": "GraphqlCompetitorUpdate",
  "query": "mutation GraphqlCompetitorUpdate($input: UpdateCompetitorInput!) { competitorUpdate(input: $input) { message } }",
  "variables": {
    "input": {
      "eventId": "{{eventId}}",
      "competitorId": {{graphqlCompetitorId}},
      "origin": "START",
      "classId": {{classId}},
      "firstname": "GraphQL Updated",
      "lastname": "Competitor Updated",
      "bibNumber": 812,
      "nationality": "SVK",
      "registration": "{{graphqlUpdatedCompetitorRegistration}}",
      "license": "B",
      "rankingPoints": 4555,
      "rankingReferenceValue": 4800,
      "organisation": "{{graphqlOrganisation}} Updated",
      "shortName": "GQLU",
      "card": {{graphqlUpdatedCompetitorCard}},
      "startTime": "{{graphqlUpdatedCompetitorStartTime}}",
      "finishTime": "{{graphqlUpdatedCompetitorFinishTime}}",
      "time": {{graphqlUpdatedCompetitorTime}},
      "teamId": null,
      "leg": 4,
      "status": "Active",
      "lateStart": true,
      "note": "Updated via GraphQL",
      "externalId": "{{graphqlUpdatedCompetitorExternalId}}"
    }
  }
}

item.name: 11 - Admin (optional)
item.description: Optional admin-only coverage. Enable with runAdminScenarios=true and provide adminBearerToken. Ranking write routes are exercised through safe validation failures to avoid destructive clears or external syncs by default.

exec: pm.test('Admin target signup returned a numeric user id', function () { pm.expect(body.results && body.results.data && body.results.data.user && body.results.data.user.id).to.be.a('number'); });
pm.test('Dashboard summary exists', function () { pm.expect(body.results && body.results.summary).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Admin users list exists', function () { pm.expect(body.results && body.results.items).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Admin users include the target user', function () { pm.expect(body.results.items.some(item => item.email === pm.collectionVariables.get('adminTargetUserEmail'))).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Target user is inactive', function () { pm.expect(body.results && body.results.user && body.results.user.active).to.eql(false); });
pm.test('Target user is active again', function () { pm.expect(body.results && body.results.user && body.results.user.active).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Admin events list exists', function () { pm.expect(body.results && body.results.items).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Admin Czech ranking overview has summary', function () { pm.expect(body.results && body.results.summary).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Snapshot detail validation error is returned', function () { pm.expect(JSON.stringify(body)).to.match(/rankingType|rankingCategory|validForMonth/); });
pm.test('Snapshot upload validation reports missing file', function () { pm.expect(JSON.stringify(body)).to.include('No file uploaded'); });
pm.test('Snapshot clear validation reports invalid month', function () { pm.expect(JSON.stringify(body)).to.include('Invalid validForMonth'); });
pm.test('Event-result detail validation error is returned', function () { pm.expect(JSON.stringify(body)).to.match(/externalEventId|rankingType|rankingCategory/); });
pm.test('ORIS sync validation rejects invalid scope', function () { pm.expect(JSON.stringify(body)).to.include('Invalid option'); });
pm.test('Event-result clear validation rejects invalid rankingType', function () { pm.expect(JSON.stringify(body)).to.include('Invalid option'); });

pm.test('Deleted target user matches the created email', function () { pm.expect(body.results && body.results.user && body.results.user.email).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('adminTargetUserEmail')); });
